moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Centre Court is calling! Wimbledon 2026 serves up two weeks of tennis action starting Monday. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The Queue is about to get legendary! Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday in SW19, bringing the biggest names in tennis to our doorstep. Get ready, London!

moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stage Begins
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stages conclude today, with the highly anticipated Round of 32 kicking off tomorrow, Sunday June 28.

angles.name: Excitement
angles.copy: The group stage drama is done! It's win or go home from tomorrow as the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout rounds begin. Who's making it through?

angles.name: UK Teams
angles.copy: England and Scotland are through! The World Cup 2026 knockout stages start Sunday – can the Home Nations go all the way?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Lineup Revealed (Ye Headlining)
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival returns to Finsbury Park, London, from July 10-12, with Kanye West (Ye) confirmed to headline all three nights, his first UK performance in a decade.

angles.name: London Festival
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is coming to Finsbury Park July 10-12! Who's ready for Ye's return to the UK stage?

angles.name: Music Buzz
angles.copy: Ye is headlining Wireless Festival for three nights straight! London's about to get loud July 10-12. Are you going?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Number One
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 2, 2026, has been announced, with 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean taking the top spot.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Your new UK Number One is 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean! What a track to kick off the weekend.

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are officially at No.1! Get 'Rein Me In' on your weekend playlist and turn it up!

moments.title: Love Island Casa Amor Twist
moments.blurb: The infamous Casa Amor twist is set to shake up the Love Island villa this Sunday, June 28, with twelve new bombshells ready to test loyalties.

angles.name: Drama Incoming
angles.copy: Brace yourselves! Casa Amor arrives on Love Island this Sunday. Who do you think will stay loyal, and who's head will turn? #LoveIsland

angles.name: Bombshells
angles.copy: Twelve new islanders are heading into Casa Amor this weekend! Get ready for some serious drama on Love Island. #LoveIslandUK

moments.title: Happy 29th Birthday, H.E.R.
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist H.E.R. (Gabriella Sarmiento Wilson) turns 29 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 29th Birthday to the incredibly talented H.E.R. today! What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday, Bruce Johnston
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, singer, songwriter, and member of The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to The Beach Boys' very own Bruce Johnston! Still making waves with that iconic sound.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Lorrie Morgan
moments.blurb: Country music star Lorrie Morgan, known for hits like 'Five Minutes' and 'Something in Red', turns 67 today.

angles.name: Country Queen
angles.copy: Raise a glass to the Queen of Country, Lorrie Morgan, celebrating her 67th Birthday today! What's your favourite Lorrie track?

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday, Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, television personality, and former lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, Nicole Scherzinger, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to sing along! Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 this Monday. What's your ultimate Pussycat Dolls anthem?

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only continuous member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a thunderous Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's iconic drummer, Ian Paice, this Monday! What's your favourite Deep Purple riff?

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday, Colin Hay
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian musician Colin Hay, frontman of Men at Work, turns 73 on June 29.

angles.name: Music Maestro
angles.copy: Can you hear that? It's the sound of us wishing Colin Hay of Men at Work a very Happy 73rd Birthday this Monday! What's your favourite Men at Work hit?

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday, Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Missy Elliott turns 55 this Wednesday. What's your all-time favourite track from the legendary artist?

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave band Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: Call Me! Debbie Harry of Blondie turns 81 this Wednesday. Celebrate with your favourite Blondie classic!

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, John Farnham
moments.blurb: Australian music legend John Farnham, known for his anthemic hit 'You're The Voice', turns 77 on July 1.

angles.name: Aussie Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the voice behind 'You're The Voice', John Farnham, this Wednesday! What a legend!
